next_steps: Run /hex-feature-dev to expand this draft into a full workplan
notes: This is a draft created by ADR-2026-04-11-0227 auto-invoke. It contains only the original prompt — no specs, steps, or tiers have been generated yet. The planner agent will fill these in when the draft is picked up.
prompt: Add an executor_integrity detector to the improver. The signal: hex-nexus emits `Workplan execution completed` while every inference call in that window failed (`free model fallback failed`, `:free providers exhausted`). The current loop reads that as success and credits the executor; the workplan ships with zero code changes on disk. Three-part fix: (1) add `Source::ExecutorIntegrity` to hex-cli/src/commands/sched/improver/discover.rs; (2) add a `hex nexus integrity --json` CLI that scans /api/events for completion-without-inference mismatches and emits findings; (3) wire it into hex-cli/assets/improver/detectors.toml with allow_nonzero_exit=true; (4) map to ActionKind::DraftWorkplan in act.rs so failures auto-draft a fix-the-executor workplan AND fire an inbox notification (the same notify_inbox_for_action helper just added). Tier T2.5 — touches discover/judge/act and adds a CLI surface, so it is cross-adapter reasoning, not pure scaffold.
